description: Composition White round neck short-sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has graphic print and lettering on the front with brand name and logo on the back of the neck Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean This white t-shirt from puma is made for girls with oodles of attitude. Let your confidence shine through this smart T-shirt as you don it with jeans or shorts and chic sneakers or canvas shoes. A star has arrived! This T-shirt is a product of puma Vision and the Cotton made in Africa tab is a symbol of fair trade practice where the purchase of this product leads to a valuable contribution to the living and working conditions of African farmers and their families. Model's Statistics: 1. The model wears size S in t-shirts 2. Height-5.7', Chest-32", Waist-28"
